acceptedAnswer.text: Yes covered if on premises during employment medical lost wages provided.[12]

suggestedAnswer.text: Cottonwood Heights slip/trips qualify if work-related even employer negligence. Insurers dispute premises rule—prove via witnesses video. PPD for scars fractures common; settle early avoids litigation.[12]
